_comment: Datadog distribution metrics only ship count/sum/min/max/avg by default — percentile aggregations (p50/p75/p90/p95/p99) are opt-in per metric. The HTTP overview dashboard's latency widgets use the `p50:` / `p95:` / `p99:` time aggregators, which require this toggle on. Applied via `script/metrics/apply_metric_configs.sh`.
